meta.name: DERS-16 Difficulties in Emotion Regulation Scale
meta.fullName: Difficulties in Emotion Regulation Scale - 16 Item Version
meta.description: The DERS-16 is a 16-item brief version of the Difficulties in Emotion Regulation Scale, assessing difficulties in emotion regulation across five dimensions: clarity, goals, impulse, nonacceptance, and strategies. It provides a comprehensive yet efficient measure of emotion dysregulation.
meta.author: Bjureberg et al. (2016)
meta.reference: Bjureberg J, Ljotsson B, Tull MT, et al. Development and validation of a brief version of the Difficulties in Emotion Regulation Scale: The DERS-16. J Psychopathol Behav Assess. 2016;38(2):284-296.
meta.instruction: Please indicate how often the following statements apply to you.

questions.text: I have difficulty making sense out of my feelings
When I’m upset, I have difficulty controlling my behaviors
When I’m upset, I have difficulty getting work done
When I’m upset, I become irritated with myself for feeling that way
When I’m upset, I start to feel very bad about myself
When I’m upset, I have difficulty thinking about anything else
I have difficulty understanding my feelings
When I’m upset, I have difficulty focusing on other things
When I’m upset, I feel out of control
When I’m upset, I feel ashamed with myself for feeling that way
When I’m upset, I believe that wallowing in it is all I can do
When I’m upset, it takes me a long time to feel better
When I’m upset, I become out of control
When I’m upset, I feel guilty for feeling that way
When I’m upset, I have difficulty concentrating
When I’m upset, I have no idea how I will end up feeling

ranges.label: Low Difficulty
ranges.description: You have low difficulty in emotion regulation. You generally manage your emotions effectively. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your emotion regulation skills
Your emotional resilience is a valuable asset in daily life
Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities

ranges.label: Moderate Difficulty
ranges.description: You have moderate difficulty in emotion regulation. You may sometimes struggle to manage intense emotions effectively. Mild psychological concerns are common in life. Focusing on self-care and healthy coping strategies can help maintain well-being.
suggestions: Practice mindfulness to increase emotional awareness
Learn about cognitive reappraisal strategies
Regular exercise can help improve emotional regulation
Consider journaling to better understand your emotional patterns
Focus on self-care with good routines and regular exercise

ranges.label: High Difficulty
ranges.description: You have high difficulty in emotion regulation. Intense emotions may significantly interfere with your daily functioning and well-being. At this level, psychological concerns may be affecting your daily life. It is recommended to take active steps and consider available support options.
suggestions: Consider seeking professional support from a therapist
Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT) skills can be very helpful
Practice distress tolerance techniques during intense emotions
Build a support network you can reach out to when overwhelmed
Consider consulting a mental health professional

ranges.label: Very High Difficulty
ranges.description: You have very high difficulty in emotion regulation. This level of difficulty may substantially impact your relationships, work, and overall quality of life.
suggestions: Strongly recommended to seek professional therapy
DBT or emotion-focused therapy can be highly effective
Develop a safety plan for times of extreme emotional distress
Consistent therapeutic support can lead to significant improvement
Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible

clarity.label: High Clarity
clarity.description: Good understanding of your emotions. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

clarity.label: Average Clarity
clarity.description: Sometimes difficulty making sense of feelings. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

clarity.label: Low Clarity
clarity.description: Significant difficulty understanding your emotions. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support

goals.label: Low Impact
goals.description: Emotions minimally affect goal-directed behavior. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

goals.label: Moderate Impact
goals.description: Emotions sometimes interfere with getting things done. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

goals.label: High Impact
goals.description: Emotions severely impair task completion and focus. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support

impulse.label: Good Control
impulse.description: Maintains behavioral control when upset. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

impulse.label: Average Control
impulse.description: Sometimes difficulty controlling behaviors when upset. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

impulse.label: Poor Control
impulse.description: Significant difficulty controlling behavior when emotionally upset. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support

nonacceptance.label: High Acceptance
nonacceptance.description: Can accept emotional reactions without self-judgment. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

nonacceptance.label: Average Acceptance
nonacceptance.description: Sometimes self-critical about emotional reactions. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

nonacceptance.label: Low Acceptance
nonacceptance.description: Strong secondary negative reactions to own emotions. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support

strategies.label: Rich Strategies
strategies.description: Multiple effective emotion regulation strategies available. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

strategies.label: Average Strategies
strategies.description: Some strategies available but may feel stuck at times. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

strategies.label: Limited Strategies
strategies.description: Lacks effective coping strategies when emotionally distressed. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support
